description: PI-operated instrument HTML page registry for aRCADA scraper

instruments.name: Hydrate Ridge Scanning Sonar
instruments.notes: Data stored as burst files. Each directory is a measurement window.

instruments.name: ASHES Seafloor Mass Spectrometer
instruments.notes: CSV files with dissolved gas concentrations. Column headers vary by deployment.

instruments.name: Fluid and Gas Sampler (RASSP)
instruments.notes: Discrete fluid samples from Hydrate Ridge and ASHES. Contains geochemistry data.

instruments.name: ASHES PI CTD
instruments.notes: Daily .dat files with SBE CTD data. Filename: CTDPFA110_IP_PORT_TIMESTAMP_UTC.dat

instruments.name: Hydrate Ridge Rotary Sonar
instruments.notes: Binary sonar scan files at 20-minute intervals. Require binary parser for .smb format.

instruments.name: Oregon Slope Base SCPR Pressure
instruments.notes: Paroscientific Nano pressure sensor log: <log-ts:TIMESTAMP> *NNNN,period_us,temp_period,val. Two sensors PARO1 and PARO2. 1 Hz sampling.

instruments.name: Axial Base Bottom Pressure Array
instruments.notes: CSV .dat files: UTC_timestamp, instrument_time, temperature, plus multiple Paroscientific pressure period columns. ~4 Hz. Filename: A0ABPA301_data_IP_PORT_TIMESTAMP_UTC.dat

instruments.name: ASHES Vent Imaging Sonar (COVIS)
instruments.notes: Reson 7125 multibeam sonar archives. Each .tar.gz contains MATLAB .mat files. Three survey types: IMAGING (plume 3D), DIFFUSE (seafloor backscatter), ENGINEERING. See COVIS/AAA-README.txt.

instruments.name: RCA DAS Optasense (2021+)
instruments.notes: Optasense DAS interrogator on RCA north and south fiber cable segments. Each HDF5 file is a short time window. Read with DASCore or h5py.

instruments.name: RCA DAS 2024 Deployment
instruments.notes: DAS differential phase (dphi) data from 2024 deployment. 10-second HDF5 files named HHMMSS.hdf5 inside date directories.

instruments.name: RCA DAS 2025 Deployment (ongoing)
instruments.notes: Ongoing DAS deployment with MultiDAS and OptoDAS interrogators. Data available 2025-present.
